revision.comment: Try more robust subst; ws for readability
removed unused parameters which are unlikely ever to be used
added parameter alias from jawiki template
moved reasonator link into separated entries
nowiki after category at end of line
As discussed on the talk page. Italic re-added, Added vertical-align (sup or super) or sub for alteration for vertical-alignment.
Use sub/sup elements to inherit default styling; rm italics option nobody asked for
Check if redirect only when page exists
no longer "being merged"; it's now the 'core' template & the others are wrappers to it

Protected "[[Template:Interlanguage link multi]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]]: over 15,000 mainspace transclusions ([Edit=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite) [Move=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefi...
as it stood, font-size:smaller violates [[MOS:FONTSIZE]]. Changing to explicit 85%
Notifying of move discussion on [[Template talk:Interlanguage link multi#Requested move 17 November 2016 |Template talk:Interlanguage link multi]]

revision.comment: Fix |=FOO bug (see before recent changes [[Johannes Georg Pahn]])
Implement vertical-align aliases 'valign' and 'v'. New testcases working.
avoid reduction of font size in infoboxes (TPER)
add short display option for wikidata links per [[Special:Permalink/1043214814#Protected edit request on 8 September 2021|tper]]

added support to optionally specify the language of the label text (as with template lang), added several parameter aliases, added named parameters for parameters (unnamed parameters still work), added enumerated parameters, tweaked display of multi-target lists and super-/sub-scripts, per talk

Undid revision 1072875044 by [[Special:Contributions/Matthiaspaul|Matthiaspaul]] ([[User talk:Matthiaspaul|talk]]) I am not strictly opposed to the implemented change, but I *am* opposed to arbitrarily adding FOUR alternate parameters for each variant. Pick one; if you're creating a new parameter you don't ned to give it multiple names

Removed new |pre=, |preX=, |ext=, |extX= as well as the |i=, |q= and |lt-lang= aliases, see talk. Readded support to optionally specify the language of the label text (as with template lang) with automatic styling per MOS (overridable through |italic=), added named (and enumerated) parameters for parameters previously only available as unnamed positional parameters, tweaked display of multi inter-wiki lists as well as of super- & subscripts, more flexible logic for language prefixes & label text

revision.comment: Improved parameter evaluation, switched |externalX to |foreignX= which appears to be more commonly used when referring to sister-projects and to avoid possible confusion with unrelated external links

revision.comment: For user convenience |language= now optionally takes a language name in addition to language codes (as the CS1/CS2/p/rp/ran templates do). (This is not possible to do for |prefix= as prefixes deviate from language codes sometimes.) Added proper Boolean parameter evaluation for allowed values taken as "true" (instead of taking any values as "true", including opposite values like 0, false, etc.) This will help to improve documentation and allow for advanced parameter interface logic in the future

revision.comment: Parameter eval tweaking. Added CSS classes "metadata" and (template-specific) "ill" to mute editorial annotation like the [xy] links in CDROM/DVD export views etc. (which wouldn't have links to sister projects). Users, who do not want to see them, can set up custom CSS to disable the display of the CSS class "ill".

revision.comment: Tweaked various edge-cases which caused sub-optimal behaviour or, in some cases, the creation of invalid HTML. Added support to specify a specific quote character with |quote=character instead of just yes (or 'q' for a language-dependent character). Added support to specify an optional |punctuation=character, which is inserted between link label text and superscripts to better comply with MOS.

revision.comment: Rolled back to rev. 1043222155 of 00:28, 9 September 2021 by [[Special:Contributions/Elli|Elli]]. There is no consensus for two dozen new parameters. There *may* be consensus for addition of the two "lang-tag" params but there is no template revision containing implementation of only that to roll back to. See [[Template talk:Interlanguage link#Back to lang tag|Talk]].
add a hairspace for italics use to avoid collisions
